productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Purple Shirt
description: Composition Purple shirt made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, box pleat at the back, branding on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This purple shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
